name: Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>微</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>び</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－リュウシシン
desc: Once per turn, if you activate a "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap Card (except during the Damage Step): You can Set 1 "Fire Formation" Trap directly from your Deck. Once per turn: You can send 2 face-up "Fire Formation" Spells/Traps you control to the GY, then target 1 "Fire Fist" monster in your GY, except "Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Dragon"; Special Summon that target.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, if you activate a "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap Card (except during the Damage Step): You can Set 1 "Fire Formation" Trap directly from your Deck. Once per turn: You can send 2 face-up "Fire Formation" Spells/Traps you control to the GY, then target 1 "Fire Fist" monster in your GY, except "Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Dragon"; Special Summon that target.
eff: Once per turn, if you activate a "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap Card (except during the Damage Step): You can Set 1 "Fire Formation" Trap directly from your Deck. Once per turn: You can send 2 face-up "Fire Formation" Spells/Traps you control to the GY, then target 1 "Fire Fist" monster in your GY, except "Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Dragon"; Special Summon that target.

mentions: Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Dragon
action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
